_comment: Hand-verified canon facts that MUST survive generation+validation unchanged. A regression guard for pipeline parse/normalisation changes (validate.py checks these against the built bank). Each entry: the exact question text and its expected correct_answer. Prefer immutable facts (Devil Fruits, crews, occupations, epithets, debut saga) over volatile ones (bounties). Update alongside deliberate phrasing changes.

facts.question: Which Devil Fruit did Monkey D. Luffy eat?
facts.answer: Gum-Gum Fruit / Gomu Gomu no Mi

facts.question: Which Devil Fruit did Portgas D. Ace eat?
facts.answer: Flame-Flame Fruit / Mera Mera no Mi

facts.question: Which Devil Fruit did Nico Robin eat?
facts.answer: Hana-Hana Fruit / Hana Hana no Mi

facts.question: Which Devil Fruit did Tony Tony Chopper eat?
facts.answer: Human-Human Fruit / Hito Hito no Mi

facts.question: Which Devil Fruit did Trafalgar D. Water Law eat?
facts.answer: Op-Op Fruit / Ope Ope no Mi

facts.question: Which Devil Fruit did Brook eat?
facts.answer: Revive-Revive Fruit / Yomi Yomi no Mi

facts.question: Which Devil Fruit did Marshall D. Teach eat?
facts.answer: Dark-Dark Fruit / Yami Yami no Mi
